content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift routes users to a custom 1-5 star gate that only sends 4-5 star raters to a hardcoded `itms-apps://…write-review` link while diverting lower ratings to a feedback form, bypassing `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview`; metadata also says "rate us 5 stars!" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1).

Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits gating or routing users based on their rating before prompting for review (5.6.1/5.6.3), since this manipulates App Store ratings and denies unhappy users the chance to leave public feedback. This implementation pre-filters sentiment and hardlinks to the write-review URL instead of using `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview(in:)` or the `RequestReview` SwiftUI environment action. Replace the custom star gate with the system review prompt shown to all users equally, and remove the "rate us 5 stars" language from the description.
